coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of what a data product is
Elementary knowledge of the product lifecycle
Ability to write clear user stories and requirements
Basic understanding of data sources and pipelines
Familiarity with metrics and KPIs
Elementary knowledge of stakeholder communication
Basic understanding of prioritization concepts
Ability to document product needs and feedback
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of SQL for data exploration
Familiarity with roadmap and backlog tools
Elementary understanding of data privacy basics
indicators: Requires constant supervision in product tasks
Can gather and organize requirements with guidance
Needs 3-6 months of mentoring in data product management

Ability to run stakeholder interviews and gather feedback

indicators: Can manage small data product features with supervision
Resolves common requirement ambiguities
Maintains product backlog and documentation effectively
